goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'sunday' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should depart from 'peterborough' and should 'arrive by 19:30'.
Make sure you get 'price' and 'departure time'.
You are also looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'alpha-milton guest house'.
Make sure you get 'star of the hotel' and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on sunday and should go to cambridge
The train should depart from peterborough and should arrive by 19:30
Make sure you get price and departure time
You are also looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called alpha-milton guest house
Make sure you get star of the hotel and postcode
